description_en: Colombo may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 21 halal restaurants and 47 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Colombo, Sri Lanka, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Colombo: 21+ halal restaurants, 47 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.8/5.
